title: geum pyrenaicum var. sylvaticum
intro: Geum pyrenaicum var. sylvaticum, also known as alpine avens, is a variety of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating digestive issues, including diarrhea and stomach ulcers. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever and combat infections. The herbal preparations of Geum pyrenaicum var. sylvaticum include tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
